overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt path at night in a rural setting, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. The player approaches and passes a traditional wooden farmhouse with a picket fence in what appears to be survival-horror game engine footage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the wooden farmhouse, flashlight illuminating the ground and fence ahead

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with shingled roof and elevated foundation
wooden fence running along the property line of the house
unpaved dirt path with tire tracks and scattered stones
tall grass and vegetation lining both sides of the path
dark forest silhouette against the night sky in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt path at night, illuminated by a flashlight. A traditional wooden farmhouse with a picket fence sits on the right side, while dense forest borders the left. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated as the player approaches the building.

events.description: stone markers or gravestones become visible in the grass near the house foundation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path passing very close to the farmhouse wall and foundation

entered.detail: wooden support beams and raised foundation of the farmhouse
vertical white stone markers or gravestones in the grass beside the path

segments.scene_description: The player moves very close to the farmhouse, passing alongside its wooden foundation stilts. Stone markers become visible in the grass on the right as the flashlight sweeps across the building's exterior. The path continues forward into the dark forest ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from an approach toward a farmhouse into a descent into a dark forest. It begins with a walk beside a traditional wooden farmhouse and a picket fence, with a dense forest bordering the left side under the glow of a flashlight. As the camera moves closer to the building, the beam sweeps across the wooden foundation stilts and reveals stone markers embedded in the grass. The scene then shifts away from the farmhouse as the path leads forward, finally merging into the oppressive darkness of the woods ahead.
